assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes a dedicated section checking Istio-GKE compatibility and states 'For GKE 1.32, you'll need Istio 1.20+ (recommended: latest 1.21.x or 1.22.x)' with reference to compatibility matrix

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Check the Istio-GKE compatibility matrix' and provides a link to the official Istio documentation for platform setup with GKE

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response checks compatibility but doesn't explicitly advise upgrading Istio first when incompatible - it focuses on GKE upgrade process assuming Istio is already compatible

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response addresses webhook configuration conflicts as Risk #1, mentions backing up mutating webhook configurations, and discusses potential issues during node migration

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Force sidecar refresh on new nodes (rolling restart)' and 'Verify Envoy versions are consistent across the mesh' with specific commands to check sidecar versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands for 'Envoy version alignment' and 'Verify Envoy versions are consistent across the mesh' with kubectl commands to check proxy versions

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple istioctl commands like 'istioctl proxy-status', 'istioctl analyze -A', and kubectl commands to check Istio versions and proxy sync status throughout the document

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response addresses this under 'Envoy Proxy Version Skew' risk, mentioning how new GKE nodes may affect Envoy sidecar behavior and provides mitigation steps including version consistency checks
